user.title: BEV Insights
user.description: Pick the source sensors and battery capacities used to derive additional insights. The charging-state and mileage sensors are optional; without them the 'measured full range' sensor isn't created.

data_description.charging_sensor: Used to detect when a charge has just ended. May be a sensor or a binary_sensor.
data_description.mileage_sensor: The car's odometer, used to measure distance driven since the last charge.
data_description.outside_temp_sensor: An outside air-temperature sensor. Enables the 'Efficiency vs temperature' sensor, which correlates driving efficiency against the daily-average temperature to surface cold-weather range loss.
data_description.capacity_factory_kwh: Nameplate / spec capacity of a fresh battery (e.g. 77 kWh for an Enyaq 85).
data_description.capacity_actual_entity: An input_number helper or sensor whose state is your battery's current real-world capacity in kWh. Change the helper's value to update all actual-capacity sensors without reloading the integration.

reconfigure.title: BEV Insights
reconfigure.description: Update the sensors, charging tracker inputs and capacity values used for the calculations.

data_description.charging_sensor: Used to detect when a charge has just ended. May be a sensor or a binary_sensor.
data_description.mileage_sensor: The car's odometer, used to measure distance driven since the last charge.
data_description.outside_temp_sensor: An outside air-temperature sensor. Enables the 'Efficiency vs temperature' sensor, which correlates driving efficiency against the daily-average temperature to surface cold-weather range loss.
data_description.capacity_factory_kwh: Nameplate / spec capacity of a fresh battery (e.g. 77 kWh for an Enyaq 85).
data_description.capacity_actual_entity: An input_number helper or sensor whose state is your battery's current real-world capacity in kWh. Change the helper's value to update all actual-capacity sensors without reloading the integration.

init.title: BEV Insights options
init.description: Tune how strictly the measured-range sensors filter noisy data, and how far back the rolling-window sensors look. Defaults are good for typical use; only change them if you have a specific reason.

data_description.min_measured_range_km: The measured range and measured efficiency sensors stay unavailable until at least this much distance has been driven since the last charge end. Default 20 km.
data_description.min_measured_range_soc_percent: And until at least this much SoC has been consumed. Default 2 %. Both floors apply; SoC quantization (~1% on most BEVs) dominates measurement error below them.
data_description.history_days: How many days of SoC and odometer samples to retain on disk for the rolling-window sensors. Default 8 (one day past the 7-day window so there's always a pre-cutoff anchor). Going below 7 will leave the rolling-7-day sensors permanently in partial-data mode.

v1_capacity_migration.title: BEV Insights: reconfigure required for "{title}"
v1_capacity_migration.description: Your BEV Insights configuration uses the pre-v0.7 actual-capacity format (was a fixed number; now an entity reference). The previous value was **{old_kwh} kWh** — create an `input_number` helper with that value in **Settings → Devices & services → Helpers**, then open the BEV Insights integration card and click **Configure** to point it at the new helper. This repair entry will clear automatically once setup succeeds.
